compiled_state.title: GREEN: Implement nava-platform headless validation script
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Create `plugins/dso/scripts/validate-nava-platform-headless.sh` to make Task 1 RED tests GREEN.

### Implementation
- Accept template names as positional args (default: nextjs flask rails)
- `--help` flag: show usage and exit 0
- `--list-flags <template>`: output required --data flags for a template (reads from copier.yml or registry)
- Probe for `uv` then `pipx` on PATH; if neither found, print install instructions and exit 1
- Install nava-platform from GitHub via uv/pipx
- Verify installation: `nava-platform --help` exits 0
- For each template: run `nava-platform app install` with --data flags, stdin from /dev/null (no TTY)
- Timeout on all subprocess calls (default: 120s, configurable via NAVA_TIMEOUT env var)
- For each template: test omitting one required --data flag → assert non-zero exit (not hang)
- Structured output per template: PASS/FAIL, exit code, --data flags used
- Log exact nava-platform commit/version installed

### File Impact
- CREATE: `plugins/dso/scripts/validate-nava-platform-headless.sh`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/validate-nava-platform-headless.sh
- [ ] Script syntax valid
  Verify: bash -n plugins/dso/scripts/validate-nava-platform-headless.sh
- [ ] Script outputs usage on --help
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/scripts/validate-nava-platform-headless.sh --help 2>&1 | grep -qi "usage"
- [ ] Script handles invalid args (non-zero exit)
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/scripts/validate-nava-platform-headless.sh --invalid-flag 2>/dev/null; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] RED tests from Task 1 now pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-validate-nava-platform-headless.sh

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (RED tests already exist) ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ All 10 tests GREEN. AC results: script exists+executable=PASS, syntax valid=PASS, --help shows Usage=PASS, invalid args exit nonzero=PASS, RED tests GREEN=PASS. Test fix: test_timeout_prevents_hang had macOS incompatibility (PATH= prefix affecting timeout lookup); fixed to use bash -c wrapper + NAVA_TIMEOUT=1 per spec.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: validation script implemented — all 10 RED tests GREEN, review passed.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
